response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable C++ experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed income domains, with most roles centered on web, JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and open-source GIS tools; there is no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle usage in financial systems or domain expertise in fixed income or investment banking.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across diverse technologies
Strong track record in open-source contributions and tooling innovation
Demonstrated ability to work in agile, CI/CD-driven environments
concerns: No visible C++ experience on Windows platform in financial systems
Lacks any mention of fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets domain knowledge
SQL experience is listed generically without context of financial databases or high-performance trading systems
